title: Social change organisation with no 990 form
excerpt:

posts.author: todd_last (Todd Last)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello monday community,

We are a social change organisation based in the UK looking to streamline our CRM process through monday.com. Having looked through the application process for the non-profit discount, we believe we do qualify, however we do not have a 990 form as required in the application form. What documentation can we otherwise provide to you to check for our eligibility in receiving the nonprofit discount?

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hio @todd_last!

Thank you for your patience as we shifted our community team around! We currently require a 501(c)(3) form to prove eligibility of your organization–not a 990.

Please let me know if you have any questions around this!
